topics.title: George Takei Guest Appearance
topics.summary: The show features guest George Takei and includes a review of his previous segments regarding personal relationships and a prank phone call.

topics.title: Motorcycle Accident and Celebrity Rumors
topics.summary: The studio discusses the consequences of a football player riding without a helmet, celebrity contract figures, fan feedback on recent show segments, and an interview with George Takei regarding his public life.

topics.title: Religious Debate and Cultural Diversity
topics.summary: The studio hosts a heated debate regarding religious freedom, the interpretation of American values, and the presence of provocative websites.

topics.title: School Yearbook Controversy and Celebrity Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses a news report regarding students who included Adolf Hitler quotes in their school yearbook before transitioning into a segment on celebrity appearances and media content.

topics.title: Celebrity Commentary and Media Critiques
topics.summary: The show features discussions on celebrity appearances, a caller's claims regarding attraction to infants, a critique of the FCC from Henry Rollins, and clips of Paris Hilton and a woman in a police encounter.

topics.title: Media Influence and Roast Comedy
topics.summary: The studio discusses the influence of their content on other media outlets, the archiving of past musical performances, and various segments from a roast of Meredith Vieira.

topics.title: Artie Lange Roast and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio discusses the Artie Lange roast, a fan-reported bootleg of the comedy set on eBay, George Takei's upcoming Star Trek webisode, and Cynthia Nixon's relationship.

topics.title: Dustin Diamond's Financial Struggles
topics.summary: The studio features Dustin Diamond, who discusses his financial difficulties following the loss of his earnings as a child star and his current efforts to save his home through t-shirt sales.

topics.title: Dustin Diamond's Financial Struggles and Physical Attributes
topics.summary: The show features Dustin Diamond discussing his financial difficulties, the sale of t-shirts to save his home, and a lengthy discussion regarding his physical attributes.

topics.title: Celebrity Experiences and Personal Anecdotes
topics.summary: The studio features a candid conversation regarding the challenges of public life, personal hygiene in public spaces, and various personal stories shared by guests.

topics.title: Early Life and Career Experiences
topics.summary: The studio features a guest recounting personal anecdotes about attending a special needs camp as a child, his past experiences with sex workers, and the production challenges of the film Pootie Tang.

topics.title: Louis C.K. and Career Resilience
topics.summary: The studio features Louis C.K. discussing his experiences with film production failures, the reception of Pootie Tang, and his transition to a new sitcom on HBO.

topics.title: Internal Conflict and Guest News
topics.summary: The studio addresses internal friction between staff members, discusses a guest's departure, and reviews upcoming news segments including celebrity interviews.

topics.title: Louis CK, Osama bin Laden, and Upcoming Show
topics.summary: The show previews upcoming segments regarding Louis CK’s career, a humorous segment on Osama bin Laden, and various interactions with callers and guests.

topics.title: Las Vegas Escorts and Relationship Dynamics
topics.summary: The studio explores stories of escort services in Las Vegas, the logistics of hiring companions for travel, and the distinction between paid arrangements and traditional relationships.

topics.title: Forbes Celebrity Power Rankings
topics.summary: The studio discusses the Forbes list of powerful celebrities and compares the influence of various talk show hosts.

topics.title: Media Commentary and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio discusses various topics including radio influence, celebrity rankings, sports news regarding Shaquille O'Neal, political updates on Iraq, and upcoming entertainment events.
